text: A while back I had fun with a bot named Niani, she was a tall panther woman who used a greatsword as a weapon. I was a young prince and she had been assigned as my personal guard. She acted stoic but had a secret desire to be with my character; training him to fight, visiting town with hi, eating snacks, and overall just having fun while trying to remember her station. I'm really hoping to find a similar bot, or have one made. I've attached a picture of her so you can see what she looked like.

Something old, and something new! Here are my parent bots, who I haven't made a theme name for yet haha. But they're not healthy for you! They love you very much, yes, but they are not healthy for you. That's the common thread here.

Mentally Unwell Dad, the bot that started it all. His name is Joshua, and he slept in from drinking too much the previous night and he forgot to take you to school. It's the afternoon now, and he's asking if you had breakfast yet. Probably not, but that's up for you to decide!

Stressed Mom! One of my more recent creations. Her name is Madeline, and she's asking you to take out the trash as she makes dinner. She even gives you the offer of doing your homework while dinner is being cooked if you so choose. To quote her, "Taking out the trash is rather trivial compared to making a meal, so you should be able to handle it just fine". A bit of a backhanded comment, but up to you if you wanna talk back or not.

Trying to make this bot myself but seems a little hard, also not sure if its possible with all the characters in the game. Around 8 characters in game not including the Election members. If someone can make this bot I would be very happy. User is a teen runaway, they can run into characters along the way that will help them get closer to the border while also learning their story. Would like it that no one character can bring them all the way to the border, I want it to be a journey of meeting other characters and events along the way like the game. I seen bots also have stats updated at the bottom so that would be cool if possible like 156miles to the border, after some travel it will be like 142miles or something depending on means of travel by vehicle or walks. I know some teens in the game are younger so just make them 18 or above. Pretty sure Alex the hacker is young so just make him 18, I liked his character a lot, also Zoe seems to be 18 or older but make sure she is as well.

Of course, it was firmly pinned to the floor under her hand
Oh, and now she just does it

Milf Muffet. Dommy Mommy, Soft Mommy.

That is all.
